scope.goal: Separate evidence data/parsing ownership from six oversized service facades and tighten the same source-size ratchet.
nonGoals: No new route, report, schema, fixture, cross-project contract, or product feature
No public loader or renderer path change

necessityProof.blockerResolved: Six v2187 remediation entries still mixed static evidence and parsing support with service orchestration.
necessityProof.consumer: v2189 final ratchet and external N5 review consume the four-item remainder.
necessityProof.whyExistingModuleCouldNotBeReused: Each evidence family has distinct frozen paths and profile-specific types; a generic shared data bag would erase ownership and couple unrelated historical versions.
necessityProof.stopCondition: All six main files are at or below 800 lines, their focused contracts and full suite pass, and the baseline contains only the four v2189 targets.

ownership.serviceFacade: loaders, checks, messages, digest assembly, and public render entry remain in src/services
ownership.evidenceModules: frozen sibling paths, evidence-specific local types, JSON readers, and deterministic requirement mappings live in src/evidence

splits.boundary: Frozen Node/Java/mini-kv paths, accepted WAL references, runtime-smoke readers, and JSON field helpers.
Operator-window evidence contracts and frozen Java/mini-kv path constants.
Precondition evidence contracts, accepted runtime guards, endpoints, and frozen paths.
Frozen upstream paths and deterministic boundary/requirement-to-snippet mappings.
Frozen upstream paths and defensive historical JSON field readers.
Frozen package evidence paths, accepted release/digest sets, and runtime-smoke reader.

validation.result: 1229 files scanned; 4 oversized files exactly match the baseline; no violation

validation.command: six affected contract tests plus source-size and governance ratchets

validation.result: All 8 deterministic shards passed: 545 files and 1661 tests, aggregate Vitest duration 3363.75 seconds.
245 total / 242 standardized / 3 AST-validated waivers / 0 non-waived unstandardized
2 files passed, 8 tests passed; walkthrough contains 3008 Chinese characters across 8 sections

screenshot.reason: The batch changes evidence/module ownership only and has no new visual surface.
